description: The main objective of this pipeline is to remove columns and annotate data. The pipeline starts with a node that removes columns and ends with another node that annotates data, in between there are other nodes that remove columns.

202ce85e-3918-4b32-8260-f066c29fe217.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
202ce85e-3918-4b32-8260-f066c29fe217.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

286a32cc-bf7a-4df9-ae9a-e74c262d962e.name: table-remove-columns
286a32cc-bf7a-4df9-ae9a-e74c262d962e.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

e2c3c7a8-ea46-49f0-a664-eee36ff0718d.name: iji-export-table-v2
e2c3c7a8-ea46-49f0-a664-eee36ff0718d.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

d2ce5c39-1686-47a0-aeb9-752d7fc06681.name: table-remove-columns
d2ce5c39-1686-47a0-aeb9-752d7fc06681.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

2ab77df2-0aed-4826-91f3-3858bb58bb56.name: modify-tables
2ab77df2-0aed-4826-91f3-3858bb58bb56.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.

853c5285-913f-49a8-9462-7b5af39b93de.name: table-remove-columns
853c5285-913f-49a8-9462-7b5af39b93de.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

da751847-b501-4139-a46d-e9c9db9167d7.name: table-merge-tables
da751847-b501-4139-a46d-e9c9db9167d7.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

9fb35325-7f09-4aef-9461-242d7656627a.name: table-remove-columns
9fb35325-7f09-4aef-9461-242d7656627a.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

1053cdd3-584b-4853-8eae-66d931ee2358.name: table-remove-columns
1053cdd3-584b-4853-8eae-66d931ee2358.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name
